title: Retry Safety, Replayability, Backoff, Jitter, and Retry Budgets · Go Client Systems · Spiral Systems Review
summary: A security reviewer reconstructing an expired incident handoff must reconstruct the governing policy from partial evidence after delay and distinguish current rules from tempting earlier ones for retry safety, replayability, backoff, jitter, and retry budgets, producing bounded retry and replay decision engine. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a Go 1.26 net/http bounded retry and replay decision engine after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit…
objectives: Classify retry candidates from operation semantics, failure phase, response status, caller budget, and server guidance. Demonstrate the result through Go 1.26 net/http, net/url, context, io, crypto/tls, RoundTripper, and httptest evidence.

Prove request bodies and credential state can be reconstructed before replaying an attempt. Demonstrate the result through Go 1.26 net/http, net/url, context, io, crypto/tls, RoundTripper, and httptest evidence.

Apply capped exponential backoff with an explicit jitter strategy and deterministic test clock. Demonstrate the result through Go 1.26 net/http, net/url, context, io, crypto/tls, RoundTripper, and httptest evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Go Retryable Classification · changed case · Review Retryable Classification
steps.instruction:
review case — Go security handoff client sees one reset, Retry-After:4, then 503 while a nested helper also retries. Prove method and body replayability, cap attempts and elapsed budget, apply deterministic jitter, and prevent duplicate or amplified work. Competency probe: Classify retry candidates from operation semantics, failure phase, response status, caller budget, and server guidance. Demonstrate the result through Go 1.26 net/http, net/url, context, io, crypto/tls, RoundTripper, and httptest evidence.

Which action demonstrates Retryable Classification without dropping earlier contracts?

Evidence target: Go Retryable Classification · changed case · Review Retryable Classification.
